introSection: Road Runner Rollercoaster is a steel roller coaster currently located at Warner Bros. Movie World in Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Sand colored track and orange-brown supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The old Vekoma trains were replaced with new ones in 2021.

fullText:
Road Runner Rollercoaster is a steel roller coaster currently located at Warner Bros. Movie World in Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia.



Sand colored track and orange-brown supports.

The old Vekoma trains were replaced with new ones in 2021.
